examples: A series of levers joined to a pointer shows pressure on a dial.
During tests over several days, the pointer or tracker tracked an IR source and directed a laser beam at that source.
She tapped on the world map with her pointer.
Three Yachvili penalties edged the French side in front before Barkley sent over another three-pointer.
The shift key pans a camera down, and the mouse controls a laser pointer.
